leadText: The Eon Flute (Japanese: むげんのふえ Infinity Flute) is a Key Item introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. It is one of the legendary artifacts that is associated with Latias and Latios.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire, when the Eon Flute is played, it summons Latios OR or Latias AS to soar in the sky above Hoenn , and fly to any city , route , or island.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method OR AS Sootopolis City (from Steven after defeating or capturing Groudon OR / Kyogre AS )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description OR AS A flute that can summon Latios or Latias no matter where you are. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A flute that can be used to summon Latios or Latias no matter where you are.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire , this item is initially in Steven 's possession. He gives it to the player after ending the world disaster caused by Groudon OR / Kyogre AS .
